idea.hook: Could a magnet TEAR YOU APART? 🧲
facts: Your average fridge magnet has a field of ~100 Gauss.
Earth's magnetic field is a gentle ~0.5 Gauss.
Magnetars are neutron stars with magnetic fields up to 10¹⁵ Gauss (1,000,000,000,000,000 Gauss!) – the strongest in the Universe.
idea.payoff: Even 1,000 km away, a magnetar's field would rip the electrons from your atoms, instantly disintegrating your body!
idea.title: This Magnet Would DISINTEGRATE You! 🧲💀

scenes.text: Could a magnet TEAR YOU APART? 🧲
scenes.visual: Dark background with a shimmering, ominous question mark formed by faint magnetic field lines. A subtle human silhouette flickers at the bottom, being subtly pulled.
A stylized fridge magnet clings to a metallic surface. Gentle, visible magnetic field lines emanate from it.
The Earth slowly rotates against a starry background, surrounded by its faint, protective magnetic field lines.
A pulsating, extremely dense neutron star (magnetar) at the center, surrounded by incredibly strong, chaotic, and bright magnetic field lines that distort the background stars.

scenes.text: 1000 km away, a magnetar would instantly disintegrate your body!
scenes.visual: A ghostly human silhouette in the foreground, being violently ripped apart into glowing particles and light streaks by overwhelming, intense magnetic field lines sweeping across the screen from a distant, unseen magnetar. The background shows swirling cosmic dust and stars.
